chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1566, 1680, 1698, 1740, 1875, 1887, 1900 & 1907 of 2023 C.P. No.D-87,138, 208, 427, 828, 946, 1303 & 1379 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.10.2024 Mr. Rizwan Ali Lashari Advocate for Petitioner in C.P. No.D-1740 of 2023. Mr. Malik Bux Mari Advocate for Petitioner in C.P. No.D-1887 of 2023. Mr. Tanveer Ahmed Daudani Advocate for Petitioner in C.P. No.D- 1900 of 2023. Mr. Yasir Ismail Khoso Advocate for Petitioner in C.P. No.D-427 of 2024. Mr. Abdullah K. Laghari Advocate for Respondents No.2 and 3 in C.P. No.D-1740 of 2023. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. ----- These Petitions pertain to appointments against Deceased Quota, by invoking Rule 11-A of Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974, which, inter alia, has been declared as ultra vires by the Honourable Supreme Court in its authoritative pronouncement handed down in the Case of General Post Office, Islamabad & others v. Muhammad Jalal (Civil Petition No. 3390 of 2021). In view of the above, these Petitions are dismissed with all pending Applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
